user.description: Select your XYAO LED panel. It must be powered on and not connected to the phone app.

bluetooth_confirm.description: Set up {name}? The panel must not be connected to the phone app while Home Assistant talks to it.

abort.no_devices_found: No XyaoLED devices found. Make sure the panel is powered on, in Bluetooth range, and not connected to the phone app.

init.description: If your panel ignores commands (the bundled handshake is rejected), capture your own init frame from the official app and paste it here as hex. See PROTOCOL.md in the repository.

display_text.name: Display text
display_text.description: Renders text and shows it on the panel.

mode.name: Mode
mode.description: One of: auto (picks static or scroll based on the text width), static (centered, single screen), scroll (smooth device-side scrolling), pages (splits long text into 64px pages shown one after another).

size.name: Font size
size.description: Font size in pixels (panel is 16px high).

speed.name: Speed
speed.description: Per-frame display time / scroll speed (device units, default 60).

font.name: Font
font.description: Path to a TrueType font file (optional).

clear.name: Clear first
clear.description: Clear the device playlist before sending (otherwise the message is appended to the loop).

display_image.name: Display image
display_image.description: Shows a full-colour image or animated GIF on the panel.

path.name: Path
path.description: Path to the image file (must be in allowlist_external_dirs).

fit.name: Fit
fit.description: contain keeps the aspect ratio, stretch fills the whole 64x16 panel.

clear.name: Clear first
clear.description: Clear the device playlist before sending.

display_pixel_art.name: Display pixel art
display_pixel_art.description: Shows a single-colour bitmap: a built-in pattern (heart, hearts, smiley, invaders, border, checker, diag, blank) or an image file.

source.name: Source
source.description: Pattern name or image file path.

threshold.name: Threshold
threshold.description: Grayscale threshold for converting an image to 1-bit.

fit.name: Fit
fit.description: contain keeps the aspect ratio, stretch fills the whole panel.

clear.name: Clear first
clear.description: Clear the device playlist before sending.
